scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix protocol && npm ci --prefix control-plane && npm ci --prefix windows-adapter
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix protocol && npm run build --prefix control-plane && npm run build --prefix windows-adapter
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix protocol && npm run test --prefix control-plane && npm run test --prefix windows-adapter
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --prefix protocol && npm run test:coverage --prefix control-plane && npm run test:coverage --prefix windows-adapter
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix protocol && npm run typecheck --prefix control-plane && npm run typecheck --prefix windows-adapter
scripts.audit:production: npm audit --omit=dev --prefix protocol && npm audit --omit=dev --prefix control-plane && npm audit --omit=dev --prefix windows-adapter
